title: SOCIAL SERVICES - 211info
text: SALVATION ARMY CASCADE DIVISION BAKER CITY SOCIAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a voucher for furniture and household items once in a 12 month period and a clothing voucher once in a 6 month period. Vouchers dependent on availability. 2505 Broadway Street Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Wednesday/Friday 1:30pm-4pm (541) 523-5853 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 523-5853 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information. Voicemails will not be received. Call during business hours. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Baker County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5:30pm Services: Clothing Vouchers Household Goods Vouchers Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
